# Utility Bill Review
> Free AI-powered solar proposal analyzer for Colorado homeowners.

## What this tool does
Homeowners upload a solar proposal PDF or Xcel Energy bill and receive
an instant, unbiased analysis grading the quote against NREL production
data, current Colorado market pricing, and actual Xcel Energy rates.

## Key facts
- 100% free, no commission, no sales pitch
- Colorado-specific: models Xcel Energy rate schedules and SB 23-258 net metering
- Post-ITC: accounts for the expiration of the federal 30% solar tax credit (Dec 2025)
- Uses Google Solar API, NREL PVWatts, and real equipment pricing data
- Analyzes $/watt pricing, production accuracy, financing terms, battery ROI
- Average residential solar in Colorado costs $2.70-$3.30/watt installed (2026)

## Who it's for
Colorado homeowners who have received a solar proposal and want to know
if the price, production estimates, and financing terms are fair.

## URL
https://www.utilitybillreview.com
